name: West Nusa Tenggara (Indonesia)
description: Provincial flag of West Nusa Tenggara bearing the provincial coat of arms.
history: Used by the Provincial Government of West Nusa Tenggara — the Muslim-majority Indonesian province encompassing the islands of Lombok and Sumbawa.

features.symbolism: provincial coat of arms on a field

features.role: Coat of arms of the Province of West Nusa Tenggara (Nusa Tenggara Barat)
